title: Three-way XOR involving bit 31 of a vector evaluates incorrectly

features.name: three-way xor expression with bit 31
features.description: Code should include a three-way XOR expression where the first and third operands are the same variable and the middle operand is bit index 31
features.snippet:
wire [7:0] x;
wire bit31_expr = x[31] ^ x[31] ^ x[31];

features.name: concatenation with xor expression comparing to slice
features.description: Code should include a concatenation operator containing an XOR expression on bit 31, compared with a part-select slice of the same vector

features.name: xor associativity with same operands
features.description: Code should include an XOR chain A ^ B ^ A where A and B are bit-selects from the same vector
features.snippet:
wire [7:0] x;
wire result = x[7] ^ x[3] ^ x[7];
